+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--

+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+    <xacro:macro name="gripper_grasping_hack" params="name">
+      <gazebo>
+        <gripper name="${name}_grasp_hack">
+          <grasp_check>
+            <attach_steps>1</attach_steps>
+            <detach_steps>2</detach_steps>
+            <min_contact_count>2</min_contact_count>
+          </grasp_check>
+          <gripper_link>${name}_left_finger_link</gripper_link>
+          <gripper_link>${name}_right_finger_link</gripper_link>
+          <palm_link>${name}_link</palm_link>
+        </gripper>
+      </gazebo>
+    </xacro:macro>
+
+    <xacro:macro name="finger_gazebo" params="name">
+<!--
+    <gazebo reference="${finger_name}_link">
+      <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+      <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+    </gazebo>
+-->
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+      <kp>1000000.0</kp>
+      <kd>100.0</kd>
+      <mu1>1.0</mu1>
+      <mu2>1.0</mu2>
+      <fdir1>0 0 1</fdir1>
+      <maxVel>1.0</maxVel>
+      <minDepth>0.00</minDepth>
+      <material>Gazebo/Black</material>
+    </gazebo>
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_joint">
+      <implicitSpringDamper>1</implicitSpringDamper>
+      <provideFeedback>1</provideFeedback>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--

+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="gripper_simple_transmission" params="name reduction" >
+    <transmission name="${name}_trans">
+      <type>transmission_interface/SimpleTransmission</type>
+      <actuator name="${name}_motor" >
+        <mechanicalReduction>${reduction}</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <joint name="${name}_joint">
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/PositionJointInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+    </transmission>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!--File includes-->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find pal_gripper_description)/urdf/deg_to_rad.urdf.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find pal_gripper_description)/urdf/gripper.transmission.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find pal_gripper_description)/urdf/gripper.gazebo.xacro" />
+
+  <xacro:macro name="pal_gripper" params="name parent *origin">
+
+  <link name="${name}_link">
+    <inertial>
+      <origin rpy="0.0 0.0 0.0" xyz="-0.00028 0.00028 -0.03963" />
+      <mass value="0.71" />
+      <inertia ixx="0.00205962" ixy="0" ixz="0"
+               iyy="0.00250896" iyz="0"
+               izz="0.00086580" />
+    </inertial>
+    <visual>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0 0 0" />
+      <geometry>
+        <mesh filename="package://pal_gripper_description/meshes/gripper_link.stl"/>
+      </geometry>
+      <!-- <material name="White"/> -->
+    </visual>
+    <collision>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0 0 0" />
+      <geometry>
+        <mesh filename="package://pal_gripper_description/meshes/gripper_link_collision.stl"/>
+      </geometry>
+    </collision>
+  </link>
+  <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+    <material>Gazebo/White</material>
+  </gazebo>
+
+  <joint name="${name}_joint" type="fixed">
+    <insert_block name="origin"/>
+    <parent link="${parent}" />
+    <child link="${name}_link" />
+    <axis xyz="0 0 0" />
+  </joint>
+
+  <link name="${name}_right_finger_link">
+    <inertial>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.00402 0.04101 0.01061" />
+      <mass value="0.06" />
+      <inertia ixx="0.00018039" ixy="0" ixz="0"
+               iyy="0.00002373" iyz="0"
+               izz="0.00018646" />
+    </inertial>
+    <visual>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.048 0 0" />
+      <geometry>
+        <mesh filename="package://pal_gripper_description/meshes/gripper_finger_link.stl" scale="-1 -1 1"/>
+      </geometry>
+      <!-- <material name="Black"/> -->
+    </visual>
+    <collision>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.048 0 0" />
+      <geometry>
+        <mesh filename="package://pal_gripper_description/meshes/gripper_finger_link_collision.stl" scale="-1 -1 1"/>
+      </geometry>
+    </collision>
+  </link>
+
+  <joint name="${name}_right_finger_joint" type="prismatic">
+    <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0. 0 0" />
+    <parent link="${name}_link" />
+    <child link="${name}_right_finger_link" />
+    <axis xyz="1 0 0" />
+    <limit effort="28.0" lower="0.0" upper="0.048" velocity="0.1" />
+    <calibration rising="0.0" />
+    <dynamics damping="2500" />
+  </joint>
+
+  <link name="${name}_left_finger_link">
+    <inertial>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.00402 0.04101 0.01061" />
+      <mass value="0.06" />
+      <inertia ixx="0.00018039" ixy="0" ixz="0"
+               iyy="0.00002373" iyz="0"
+               izz="0.00018646" />
+    </inertial>
+    <visual>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0.048 0 0"/>
+      <geometry>
+        <mesh filename="package://pal_gripper_description/meshes/gripper_finger_link.stl"/>
+      </geometry>
+      <!-- <material name="Black"/> -->
+    </visual>
+    <collision>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0.048 0 0" />
+      <geometry>
+        <mesh filename="package://pal_gripper_description/meshes/gripper_finger_link_collision.stl"/>
+      </geometry>
+    </collision>
+  </link>
+
+  <joint name="${name}_left_finger_joint" type="prismatic">
+    <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0. 0 0" />
+    <parent link="${name}_link" />
+    <child link="${name}_left_finger_link" />
+    <axis xyz="-1 0 0" />
+    <limit effort="28.0" lower="0" upper="0.048" velocity="0.1" />
+    <calibration rising="0.0" />
+    <dynamics damping="2500" />
+  </joint>
+
+  <!-- Grasping frame -->
+  <joint name="${name}_grasping_frame_joint" type="fixed">
+    <parent link="${name}_link" />
+    <child link="${name}_grasping_frame" />
+    <origin xyz="0.12 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+  </joint>
+  <link name="${name}_grasping_frame">
+    <inertial>
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+      <mass value="0.0001" />
+      <inertia ixx="0.00001" ixy="0.0" ixz="0.0"
+               iyy="0.00001" iyz="0.0"
+               izz="0.00001" />
+    </inertial>
+  </link>
+
+  <xacro:gripper_simple_transmission name="${name}_left_finger" reduction="1.0"/>
+  <xacro:gripper_simple_transmission name="${name}_right_finger" reduction="1.0"/>
+
+  <xacro:finger_gazebo name="${name}_left_finger"/>
+  <xacro:finger_gazebo name="${name}_right_finger"/>
+  <xacro:gripper_grasping_hack name="${name}"/>
+
+ </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>
